zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Peverel於大約1305年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾卡素 阿什比時，她的父親Robert Peverel27歲，母親Alice Lisle23歲。她於1318年與John Engaine結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1359年6月30日之後在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Peverel于大约1305年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾卡素 阿什比时，她的父亲Robert Peverel27岁，母亲Alice Lisle23岁。她于1318年与John Engaine结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1359年6月30日之后在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Peverel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Peverel was born about 1305, in Castle Ashby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Peverel, was 27 and her mother, Alice Lisle, was 23. She married John Engaine in 1318. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. She died after 30 June 1359, in England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé John Engaine en 1318. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée après 30 juin 1359, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Stow Cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 스타우 c 크이
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Peverel(이)가 대략 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 카스틀 애스h비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Peverel(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Lisle(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1318년 John Engaine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1359년 6월 30일 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.Stow Cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, England: стоу кум куи, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Peverel родилась около 1305 г. в местности кастл ашби, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Peverel было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Lisle, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Engaine в 1318 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла после 30 июнь 1359 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.
